meanings.definition: fill or close tightly with or as if with a plug

examples: Students must plug away at this problem
he punched me in the stomach

meanings.definition: make a plug for; praise the qualities or in order to sell or promote

examples: She plugged a cork in the wine bottle

meanings.definition: (of a coin) altered by the insertion of a plug of base metal

examples: the storm was responsible for many blocked roads and bridges
